# my-website




<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<title>Joy Adoption Center Pro</title>
</<head>

<body>

<div class="navbar">🐾 Joy Adoption Center 🐾 </div>

<div class="section-title">Adopt Your Pets</div>

<!-- FILTER -->
<div class="filters">
<input type="radio" id="all" name="f" checked>
<label for="all">All</label>

<input type="radio" id="dogs" name="f">
<label for="dogs">Dogs</label>

<input type="radio" id="cats" name="f">
<label for="cats">Cats</label>

<input type="radio" id="tortoise" name="f">
<label for="tortoise">Tortoise</label>

<input type="radio" id="rabbits" name="f">
<label for="rabbits">Rabbits</label>
</div>

<!-- CARDS -->
<div class="container">

<div class="card dog">
<img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1558788353-f76d92427f16?w=300" width="150">
<div class="card-content">
<h3>Buddy</h3>
<p>Labrador • 2 yrs</p>
<button class="adopt-btn">Adopt</button>
<br><br>
</div>
</div>

<div class="card cat">
<img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1518791841217-8f162f1e1131?w=300">
<div class="card-content">
<h3>Whiskers</h3>
<p>Persian • 1 yr</p>
<button class="adopt-btn">Adopt</button>
<br><br>
</div>
</div>

<div class="card dog">
<img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1507146426996-ef05306b995a?w=300" >
<div class="card-content">
<h3>Charlie</h3>
<p>Pug • 1 yr</p>
<button class="adopt-btn">Adopt</button>
<br><br>
</div>
</div>

<div class="card rabbit">
<img src="data:image/jpeg;base64,">
<div class="card-content">
<h3>Coco</h3>
<p>Palomino • 1 yr</p>
<button class="adopt-btn">Adopt</button>
<br><br>
</div>
</div>


<div class="card dog">
<img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1548199973-03cce0bbc87b?w=300" >
<div class="card-content">
<h3>Max</h3>
<p>Beagle • 4 yrs</p>
<button class="adopt-btn">Adopt</button>
<br><br>
</div>
</div>

<div class="card cat">
<img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1574158622682-e40e69881006?w=300">
<div class="card-content">
<h3>Milo</h3>
<p>Bengal • 2 yrs</p>
<button class="adopt-btn">Adopt</button>
<br><br>
</div>
</div>

<div class="card rabbit">
<img src="data:image/jpeg;base64,">
<div class="card-content">
<h3>Luna</h3>
<p>Dutch Rabbit • 1 yrs</p>
<button class="adopt-btn">Adopt</button>
<br><br>
</div>
</div>

<div class="card cat">
<img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1533743983669-94fa5c4338ec?w=300" >
<div class="card-content">
<h3>Simba</h3>
<p>Maine Coon • 3 yrs</p>
<button class="adopt-btn">Adopt</button>
<br><br>
</div>
</div>

<div class="card dog">
<img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1543466835-00a7907e9de1?w=300" >
<div class="card-content">
<h3>Rocky</h3>
<p>German Shepherd • 3 yrs</p>
<button class="adopt-btn">Adopt</button>
<br><br>
</div>
</div>

<div class="card tortoise">
<img src="data:image/jpeg;base64,">
<div class="card-content">
<h3>Cherry</h3>
<p>Burmese Star • 2 yrs</p>
<button class="adopt-btn">Adopt</button>
<br><br>
</div>
</div>


<div class="card cat">
<img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1543852786-1cf6624b9987?w=300" width="200">
<div class="card-content">
<h3>Kitty</h3>
<p>Ragdoll • 2 yrs</p>
<button class="adopt-btn">Adopt</button>
<br><br>
</div>
</div>

</div>

<!-- FORM -->
<div class="form-section">
<h2>Adoption Form</h2>
<input type="text" placeholder="Name">
<input type="email" placeholder="Email">
<input type="tel" placeholder="Phone">

<select>
<option>Buddy</option>
<option>Whiskers</option>
<option>Charlie</option>
<option>Max</option>
<option>Milo</option>
<option>Simba</option>
<option>Rocky</option>
<option>Kitty</option>
</select>

<button>Submit</button>
</div>

<!-- FOOTER -->
<div class="footer">
    <div class="footer-container">

        <div>
            <h3>About Us</h3>
            <p>We help pets find loving homes. Adopt, don't shop ❤️</p>
        </div>

        <div>
            <h3>Quick Links</h3>
            <p><a href="#">Home</a></p>
            <p><a href="#">Adopt</a></p>
            <p><a href="#">Contact</a></p>
        </div>

        <div>
            <h3>Contact</h3>
            <p>Email: adopt@pets.com</p>
            <p>Phone: +91 98765 43210</p>
        </div>

    </div>

    <div class="copy">
        © 2026 Joy Adoption Center | All Rights Reserved
    </div>
</div>

</body>
</html
